prestazioni: Replace the Rover 3.9L V8 (engine code: 14CUX) with a fully forged internals build using Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a steel crankshaft from Rover Performance. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Piper Cams (280° duration, 0.500" lift) for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Install a custom-fabricated stainless steel exhaust system by Janspeed, featuring 2.5" primary headers merging into a 3.5" collector, terminating in a pair of Borla Pro XS mufflers for a deep, aggressive tone without drone. Pair with a custom ECU remap by DTAfast (S80 Pro standalone) to optimize fuel and ignition timing for the new cam profile and exhaust flow.

Upgrade the stock Rover SD1-derived R380 gearbox with a Quaife ATB differential and a close-ratio gearset from a Rover V8-powered TVR Chimaera. Replace the stock clutch with a Sachs Performance twin-plate unit and lightweight flywheel to handle increased torque and reduce rotational mass.
estetica: Fit a custom widebody conversion kit by Kamei, extending the front and rear fenders by 2" to accommodate 17x9" (front) and 17x10" (rear) OZ Racing Superleggera III wheels, wrapped in 225/45 and 255/40 Toyo R888R tires. Pair with custom-fabricated aluminum fender flares by The Phirm for a seamless finish.

Replace the stock front bumper with a carbon fiber replica of the MG RV8 Le Mans race car bumper by Seibon Carbon, featuring integrated tow hooks and a lower splitter. Add a custom rear diffuser by APR Performance, fabricated from carbon-Kevlar hybrid material to match the Le Mans aesthetic while improving rear downforce.

Install a custom interior retrim by Trim Developments, featuring full black Alcantara upholstery with red stitching, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter), and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (6-point, bolt-in, with integrated harness bar). Replace the stock gauges with a Stack Motorsport digital dash, featuring a 5" LCD display and programmable shift lights.
